signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Targets 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Targets 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions reaching 148 million.[2] The highly anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** has been confirmed to slash transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 millisec
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET

signals.headline: Ethereum Reclaims Transaction Activity Leadership | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Reclaims Transaction Activity Leadership | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ethereum transactions jumped 41% over the past seven days, reclaiming activity leadership from Solana after ceding it through much of 2025.[1] ETH posted an 8.6% daily gain, pushing price above $2,350 resistance.[1] A close above $2,500 would confirm a breakout and likely drive rotation from ETH shorts into spot accumulati

signals.headline: Based on the search results provided, here are the key market-moving developments:
signals.raw: Based on the search results provided, here are the key market-moving developments:

signals.headline: Solana Reclaims $85 Support Level | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Reclaims $85 Support Level | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
SOL climbed 6.3% on the day to $86.55, reclaiming the $85 level that acted as resistance through March.[1] A weekly close above $92 opens room toward $105, where Q4 2025 ETF launch highs sit.[1] Funding rates on SOL perps remain slightly positive, indicating leveraged longs have not yet crowded the trade, favoring upside asymmetry.[1]

signals.headline: Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 1, the Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked with $280 million withdrawn, involving sophisticated social engineering of Drift Security Council members.[5] This represents a significant risk event for the ecosystem.
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET
